ChamaFi — ChamasThat Grow

Empowering African communities with decentralized finance tools to save, invest, and grow together.

Join Waitlist
How It Works

The Challenge

Traditional savings groups face modern challenges

Chamas and savings circles are vital to African communities, but they struggle with transparency, accessibility, and growth opportunities.

Lack of Transparency

Manual record keeping leads to disputes and mistrust among members.

Limited Accessibility

Geographic constraints and banking requirements exclude many potential members.

Growth Constraints

Limited investment options and lack of financial tools prevent groups from maximizing returns.

Our Solution

ChamaFi transforms traditional savings groups

Leveraging blockchain technology to bring transparency, accessibility, and growth opportunities to African savings circles.

Blockchain Transparency

All transactions and records are stored on the Celo blockchain, ensuring complete transparency and immutability.

Mobile-First Access

Built for mobile devices with Opera MiniPay integration, making financial services accessible to anyone with a basic smartphone.

DeFi Investment Options

Access to yield-generating DeFi protocols allows savings groups to earn higher returns on their collective funds.

Community Governance

Decentralized decision-making tools empower all group members to participate in financial decisions.

How It Works

Simple steps to financial empowerment

ChamaFi makes it easy for savings groups to manage funds, make decisions, and grow together.

1

Create Group

Set up your savings group with member details and contribution rules on the Celo blockchain.

2

Contribute

Members make regular contributions directly to the group's smart contract wallet.

3

Invest & Grow

Vote on investment opportunities in DeFi protocols to generate returns for the group.

4

Distribute Returns

Profits are automatically distributed to members based on their contributions and voting power.

Ready to transform your savings group?

Join our waitlist to be among the first to experience ChamaFi when we launch.
